---
description: "Guidance for the embedded learning docs under Summary"
applyTo: "Summary/**/*.md"
---

This folder is the project knowledge base.

- Keep the numbered structure stable so the docs remain easy to navigate.
- Add or update small focused lessons instead of long prose dumps.
- Tie explanations back to the current STM32 project files when relevant.
- Prefer concrete examples, signal flow, and practical notes over generic theory.
- When a code change introduces a new concept, capture it here with a short entry.
- Keep the tone instructional and concise.
